Given that $e^x = 1/0! + x/1! + x^2/2! + \dots + x^n/n! + \dots$ find, in terms
of $e$, the exact values of

\begin{enumerate}[(a)]
\item $\dfrac{1}{1!} + \dfrac{2}{3!} + \dfrac{3}{5!} + \dots + \dfrac{n}{(2n - 1)!} + \dots$ and
\item $\dfrac{1}{3!} + \dfrac{2}{5!} + \dfrac{3}{7!} + \dots + \dfrac{n}{(2n + 1)!} + \dots$
\end{enumerate}
